data.title: Infini founder: If hackers return funds, we are willing to provide a 20% reward and not take legal action
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Christian, founder of the stablecoin digital bank Infini, said in a post, “I know hackers may monitor my tweets, so this is my sincere message: I have tried my best to show that there are still kind and responsible people in this industry. I deeply regret my mistake and will work hard to do the right thing for my users.” “I hope there is a way to recover what we lost. I am willing to offer 20% of the stolen amount as a bounty and promise not to take legal action if the funds are returned. No matter what, I will continue to love and support this industry.”

data.title: Consumer-grade public chain Morph launches DeFi activity version 2.0: new partners and limited-time 7x points rewards
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Starting from 10 pm Beijing time on February 24, the consumer-grade public chain Morph added two new Defi liquidity pool partners, Concrete and Layer Bank, based on the original bulbaswap liquidity pool.
Currently, deploying assets into liquidity pools will significantly increase the number of Morph points a user earns compared to just holding assets on-chain, with each decentralized application (dApp) having its own multiplier: BulbaSwap - 2x; LayerBank - 2x; Concrete - 2.6x. At the same time, to celebrate the cooperation with new partners, Morph will provide higher Morph points bonuses for these liquidity pools in the first 7 days: from today, day 1 to day 7 - 7x bonus, and after day 8, return to the above standard multiples (depending on the liquidity pool and asset: 2x/2.6x).
It is reported that this Defi event is a limited-time 7x points reward event on the Morph Defi Frenzy 1.0 version. In Morph's ongoing Defi activities, users can cross-chain and deploy any eligible assets, including BGB, ETH, USDC, USDT, WBTC, pumpBTC, USDe, weETH, LBTC, MX. Different assets correspond to different bonus rates: for example, pumpBTC, weETH, LBTC - 2 times; USDe - 2.6 times, etc.
Currently, Morph points are worth over $11 on the Whales website.

data.title: Merlin Chain PoS Upgrade Prestage Staking Campaign Phase 3 Launched: Unlimited Staking Opened, APR Locked at 15%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Merlin Chain will officially start the third phase of PoS Prestage staking at 14:00 GMT today. In this phase, the upper limit of single-period staking is cancelled, and the annualized yield is anchored at 15% for a long time.
After the subsequent PoS mainnet upgrade, it will support the staking and governance voting of BTC/MBTC dual assets, and open up the liquidity of the Bitcoin ecosystem.
In addition, the PoS upgrade will further expand the number of network validators, which is conducive to further improving the decentralization and security of Merlin Chain.

data.title: Montana house representatives reject Bitcoin reserve bill
data.description:
Montana House has rejected the Bitcoin reserve bill. The Bitcoin reserve bill aimed for $50M in crypto. The house cited risk to taxpayer funds. On February 22, 2025, Montana’s House of Representatives decisively voted down House Bill No. 429, a proposal that aimed to establish Bitcoin (BTC) as a state reserve asset. The 41-59 vote […]
The post Montana house representatives reject Bitcoin...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/montana-house-representatives-reject-bitcoin-reserve-bill/

data.title: Robinhood Chief Legal Officer: The SEC shouldn’t have investigated
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The SEC terminated its investigation into RobinHood Crypto and took no action. In this regard, Dan Gallagher, Chief Legal, Compliance and Corporate Affairs Officer of Robinhood Markets, Inc., said: "I appreciate the decision of the US SEC staff to end the investigation without taking any action. It needs to be made clear that this investigation should not have been launched at all. Robinhood Crypto always respects federal securities laws and will never allow securities trading. As we explained to the SEC, any case against Robinhood Crypto will fail. Thanks for the official end of this investigation. I am glad to see the SEC return to the rule of law and commit to fairness." (newsroom)

data.title: PancakeSwap is now live on the Monad testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: PancakeSwap posted on the X platform that it is now online on the Monad test network.

data.title: Crypto VC funding drops to bear market levels in February
data.description:
VC funding for crypto projects slowed down dramatically in February, reflecting the market downturn. Funds are more selective about projects that can deliver results and are adaptable to a shifting market.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-vc-funding-drops-in-february/

data.title: Bitcoin Retail Investor Demand Rebounds to Neutral Levels
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cointelegraph reports that Bitcoin retail investor demand is experiencing a resurgence. The 30-day demand change rate has improved from -21% to a neutral level. The last time a similar level was observed was in 2021. Historical data suggests that such recoveries often precede price increases.
